vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-507: beads db not initialized on fresh install — bd init must be run once per project

plan.title: beads db not initialized on fresh install — bd init must be run once per project
plan.author: agent:claude-opus-4-6

narratives.Problem: The three-layer beads auto-init fix (commit a2663a0b) has zero test coverage. createBeadsFromVBrief has 5 distinct code paths (CLI missing, redirect creation, db not found auto-init, successful creation, idempotent cleanup) that are untested.
narratives.Proposal: Add unit tests for createBeadsFromVBrief covering all auto-init paths, using the established vi.hoisted + mockExecAsync pattern from compact-beads.test.ts.

items.title: Add unit tests for createBeadsFromVBrief auto-init and recovery paths

narrative.Action: Add a new describe block in src/lib/vbrief/__tests__/beads.test.ts for createBeadsFromVBrief. Mock execAsync via vi.hoisted pattern. Test 5 paths: (1) bd CLI not found returns error, (2) worktree redirect file creation when main .beads/ exists, (3) database not found triggers bd init --prefix, (4) successful bead creation from plan items with correct labels/deps, (5) idempotent cleanup of existing beads before re-creation.

subItems.title: Test returns error when bd CLI is not in PATH
Test creates .beads/redirect file when workspace is a worktree and main repo has .beads/
Test auto-runs bd init --prefix when bd list fails with database not found
Test creates beads from plan items with correct labels and dependency edges
Test deletes existing beads for same label before creating new ones (idempotency)
